review_title: Best open source software for Test Automation
description: I strongly recommend this software for Web application Automation testing
author: Swarupa K.
pros: Best part of this software is it's open source and it supports web and client services based application. It supports multiple languages like Java, Java script, C#, Python etc It supports multiple environment Most of the companies use this product for their Test Automation
cons: Only drawback of this software is it won't support Windows based application. And it requires more programming knowledge to write and automate scripts

review_title: One of the best Automation tool for web application
description: I strongly recommend this for Web UI and API test automation purpose
author: Charan Raj Y.
pros: Best part of Selenium is it supports multiple languages like Java, Java script, python, c# etc It supports multiple environments like Windows, IOS, Linux It has huge support from different business groups
cons: Nothing least about this tool It doesn't support windows application

description: We can easily use this tool to design our automation scripts
author: Shaik Mukthiyar A.
pros: Automation of sites without programing knowledge
cons: Running of scripts taking too much time and need better reporting
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Selenium Use Cases and Deployment Scope
description: We use a Selenium based test automation framework (developed in-house) for testing of our web-based application using variety of browsers.
author: Piyush J.
pros: I have used Selenium in several technology organizations and one strength that I see is that Selenium can be integrated into frameworks written using different programming languages which allows for native support from organizations development teams and eliminates the need of introducing other languages. Selenium has a powerful object identification mechanism which provides the ability to create custom object repositories and map out entire application interfaces before the tests are even developed. The Selenium community is extremely helpful and even for beginners there are answers available for most questions and challenges that may come up.
cons: As some web applications update content dynamically I have experienced "stale element exception" quite a lot and it would be a helpful feature if Selenium had a find element retry mechanism embedded into the framework itself.

description: To testers who wants to work with automation of application web, selenium it is the best option to this. Very helpfull on searching elements and writting scrips.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The plugging is great in order to help finding elements on page.
cons: There is nothing I've liked least about this software

author: yoshitha D.
pros: Reporting, multi browser testing and parallelism
cons: Drivers getting update rapidly and hard of configuration

review_title: It is a tool that allows me to make my testing process with greater precision
description: I like so much that product, I can let you know the pros and cons of the tools I use every day
author: Karen Jeraldine S.
pros: I can automate my tests and do them several times with just programming the code, it gives me the certainty that everything is going well with my work
cons: I would like to be able to use it with all browsers as good as I do with google chrome, I would like to be more intuitive.

description: Great tool for automated functional and regression testing
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tool is very handy for functional and regression testing . It supports light out testing. The best part is we just need to run a script for the testing and we get results accordingly. It supports almost all the browsers like chrome, opera, firefox etc
cons: The thing I hate about it is it cannot do image verification or comparison other than that it's a great tool for automation testers
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Selenium upgrade fastly and touch with it.
author: Hansani E.
pros: 1. open source - free to use 2. Wide range of supporting languages - java, Ruby, C#, PHP, JavaScript, Perl platform-windows Linux mac android browsers-chrome, Firefox, Internet explore, safari, opera 3. More library plugins - Appium and Selendroid 4. Support mobile testing . 5. integrated with agile workflow
cons: 1. Selenium doesn’t allow for code less testing. 2. No built-in image comparison (No image verification) 3. No reporting capabilities

review_title: If you're married to Selenium, this will help you avoid divorce
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Qualitia helps fix what's wrong with Selenium in the redundancy of coding each and every test. it makes implementing new Mobile, Desktop, or Web tests go MUCH faster
cons: For simplicity's sake we wanted a single product fix so we dropped what little work we did in Selenium and went with a simpler competitor that could offer the whole package.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: sindhu B.
pros: Test automation is made easier by this great add on.
cons: Could have included a .JAR file to use in the script.

review_title: To sum it up, Qualitia is Quality!
author: Laron H.
pros: Qualitia software is a great solution for testing applications. It creates a easy-to-learn way of developing automated testing scripts. If you are not deep in programming, or are inexperienced in it, Qualitia is the solution for you.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
